prerequisites: An API token, which you can find in the ReferralHero dashboard under Account > API.
At least one ReferralHero campaign whose data you want to extract.

authMethods.name: API token
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a ReferralHero API token, supplied through the connector's required api_key field. ReferralHero accepts the token in an Authorization header using the Bearer scheme (Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN), or alternatively in an X-API-Key header if the client cannot send the Authorization header. Keep the token secret, since it grants access to your ReferralHero account.

setupSteps.title: Locate your API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to ReferralHero and open the dashboard. Navigate to Account > API to find your API token. This token is used to authenticate all REST API requests against your account.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the required api_key field to your ReferralHero API token. This is the single secret the connector needs; it is sent as Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_TOKEN (or X-API-Key) on each request.

setupSteps.title: Identify your campaign
setupSteps.body: ReferralHero data is scoped per campaign. Each campaign has a 12-character UUID that begins with 'M', found in the dashboard under Campaign > Installation > Instructions. Note the campaign(s) you want to sync so the correct data is extracted.
